judgment.summary: Fundamental visibility is extremely limited due to a lack of growth, margin, and cash flow data.
negatives: Trailing P/E 45.17x — high valuation relative to earnings.

news.paragraph: Energy stocks are currently leaning lower as investors weigh concerns over inflation and elevated oil prices. Options traders should monitor geopolitical developments related to Iran and broader inflation trends, as these factors are contributing to downward pressure in the energy sector and broader equity futures.
